title: cyclosorus palmeri
intro: Cyclosorus palmeri, also known as the Palmer's lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus palmeri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
